name: PORTSMOUTH SQUARE INC
summary: Portsmouth Square, Inc. is a California corporation incorporated in 1967, formed to acquire and operate a hotel property in San Francisco, California through a California limited partnership called Justice Investors Limited Partnership (Justice or the Partnership). The company operates in the lodging and real estate industries, primarily in the San Francisco Bay area. Approximately 75.9% of its outstanding common stock is owned by The InterGroup Corporation (NASDAQ: INTG).
